framework.name: Bundling-Unbundling Cycle
framework.description: Technology markets go through cycles of unbundling (specialized point solutions proliferate) followed by rebundling (platforms consolidate tools). Currently entering a bundling phase after 10+ years of SaaS proliferation.
framework.raw_quote: We had gone through 10 years plus of this proliferation of SAS, the unbundling. So I was like, huh, okay, there's going to be a bundling of go to market tooling.
